question_title: What will be the value of "Market Yield on U.S. Treasury Securities at 1-Year Constant Maturity, Quoted on an Investment Basis" on 2026-01-14?
summary: The FRED DGS1 series already contains the resolution value for 2026-01-14: 3.50%. The 1-Year Treasury yield has been in a narrow 3.47-3.53% range in early January 2026, with a mild downtrend from the 3.60%+ levels in early December. Since the actual data point is already published, my forecast is tightly centered on 3.50%.
